data.title: Bitcoin Slips Below $95,000 as AI Stock Pullback Spooks Markets — Here Is Why This Dip Might Not Mean What You Think
data.description:
Bitcoin's value has dipped below the $95,000 mark, influenced by a recent pullback in AI-related stocks that has caused apprehension within the broader financial markets. This decline may initially seem concerning, but it's essential to understand that this dip in Bitcoin's price doesn't necessarily signify a long-term negative trend or loss of investor confidence. Several factors could contribute to this fluctuation in price, and it may represent a temporary market correction rather than an indication of Bitcoin's overall trajectory. Here’s a closer examination of the underlying reasons for this dip and why it might not mean what you think.
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-slips-below-95000-as-ai-stock-pullback-spooks-markets-here-is-why-this-dip-might-not-mean-what-you-think/

data.title: Russia to seek assistance from foreign exchanges when seizing crypto
data.description:
The Russian government will rely on the cooperation of foreign-based trading platforms when it needs to confiscate crypto holdings as part of criminal proceedings. That’s according to a draft law that has been advancing in the Russian parliament and recently overcame another hurdle. The legislation regulates the seizure of digital assets by the Russian state. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-to-seek-assistance-seizing-crypto/

data.title: Canary Capital’s XRPC ETF Breaks 2025 Records With Massive Day-One Volume — Here Is Why Investors Are Paying Attention
data.description:
Canary Capital's newly launched XRPC Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) has shattered records for the year 2025, achieving an unprecedented trading volume on its very first day. This remarkable performance has caught the eye of investors, and in this article, we will explore the reasons behind the heightened interest in this particular ETF and what factors have contributed to its explosive start in the market. data.title: BlackRock’s BUILD launches on BNB Chain as RWA momentum accelerates
data.description:
The largest tokenized RWA has debuted on BNB Chain. Investors can now access tokenized US dollar yields on a user-friendly platform. Real-world assets top $36 billion after a 6% increase in the previous month. BNB Chain has welcomed a new resident today as BlackRock’s USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUILD) went live on the platform
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/blackrocks-build-launches-on-bnb-chain-as-rwa-momentum-accelerates/

data.title: A major whale opened a new 25x leveraged long position in BTC, worth $67 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the "mysterious whale" has now opened a 25x leveraged long position in BTC, currently worth $67 million. The whale also holds a 25x leveraged long position in ETH in two wallets, with a floating loss of $3.6 million.
